name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, unformatted purchase order data causes compliance issues. We convert raw data into formatted compliance summaries instead of manual formatting of purchase orders.
problem_solved: Unformatted purchase order data leads to compliance issues.
features: manual data entry for purchase orders
